children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: With respect to funding under this part, if certification of consistency with the consolidated plan pursuant to is withheld from an applicant who has submitted an application for that certification, such applicant may appeal such decision to the Secretary.section 11361 of this title

children.heading: Procedure
children.label: b Procedure
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a procedure to process the appeals described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Determination
children.label: c Determination
children.text: Not later than 45 days after the date of receipt of an appeal described in subsection (a), the Secretary shall determine if certification was unreasonably withheld. If such certification was unreasonably withheld, the Secretary shall review such application and determine if such applicant shall receive funding under this part.
